title: Access Control, Views & Auditing
description: The security sublanguage that closes the course: DCL (GRANT/REVOKE) and the principle of least privilege, roles as reusable privilege bundles, views as an access-control boundary that exposes only safe columns and rows, and auditing plus backup/recovery — mapping onto the CIA triad. Mind the engine: GRANT/REVOKE/roles are Oracle/server SQL you learn for the exam, while CREATE VIEW actually runs in the browser IDE.
